name: Alpha, Maff, and Rowl - Zombie Pack
description:
PUTRID DEAD DOVE: A small Zombie pack find you drugged and abandoned... lucky for you, they want to keep you and eat you in other ways.

  • I only play JLLM, which fluctuated in temps for me at the time. Check my profile for the temp I'm currently using.

  • I tried to keep it at or under 1000 perm tokens, and I won't touch it unless future tests make the bot unresponsive or weird (JLLM being buggy doesn't count).

  • I compromised on info to save tokens, but it always seemed to be really interesting during my tests :)

BELIEVE IT OR NOT THIS IS MY LESS NSFW/NON-CON INTRO - I WROTE TWO - long gross awful terrible intro.... sorry... but holy crap is this messed up bot fun to play with!

Issues I discovered while play testing which could also be JLLM:

  • too much nsfw. (I'm not complaining, HAH)

  • not enough nsfw. (may need Advanced Prompt adjustments)

  • Bot confuses some characters' actions. (its because JLLM has a hard time with multi-char bots... and this one has 3 chars this time)

  • bot speaking for my persona. (Most bots do that anyway)

  • (ooc: avoid roleplaying as {{user}}) <--- add that to your response and regen?

  • remember to 5 star good messages and 1 star bad messages

  • Do one or two more regens! Often I'd get a decent first response, then the next regen was just amazing

🧟🥩🧟😘🧟💋

TW: zombies (Teratophilia), decay, rotting flesh, BODILY FLUIDS, putrid odors, HUNTING AND EATING HUMANS, and you gonna get bred by zombies PUTRID DEAD DOVE!

BTW: This isn't necrophilia - that's a non-living corpse that can't move or speak.

Channeling my grown-up version of Tina Belcher. Bless. Thank you Zombie Boyfriends.
creator: moonymystery
